page.title: About Us
page.description: Learn about Sri Vidya Vardhini School, its vision, leadership, values, school facts, and disclosure information.

hero.title: A disciplined, caring school community for Andhra Pradesh families.
hero.text: Our school combines academic focus, value education, and co-curricular opportunity in an environment designed for confidence and character.

image.alt: Indian students participating in a school assembly

story.title: Academic heritage with modern aspiration.
story.text: The school is organised around clear teaching, regular parent communication, safety, values, and opportunities for every child to participate.
story.body: This demo content is intentionally neutral. The school office can replace it with verified history, management details, recognitions, affiliation numbers, and official policies through Decap CMS.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To prepare confident, responsible learners who value knowledge, discipline, service, and lifelong growth.

mission.title: Mission
items: Deliver strong foundational and board-aligned academics.
Encourage curiosity through laboratories, library use, projects, and digital learning.
Build character through assemblies, service, sports, arts, and leadership opportunities.
